scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names services,backend,frontend --prefix-colors magenta,blue,green "npm run dev:services" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/frontend && npm run lint --workspace=apps/backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/backend && npm run test --workspace=apps/frontend
